title: Apache Spark Quiz
description: Test your Spark distributed processing knowledge.

questions.question: In Spark, what is the difference between a Transformation and an Action?

options.text: Transformations are lazy (define a plan); Actions trigger actual computation and return results
Actions are lazy; Transformations execute immediately
Transformations require a SparkSession; Actions do not

questions.question: What is a Shuffle in Spark and why is it expensive?

options.text: It is the process of sorting data alphabetically
It redistributes data across partitions — requiring disk I/O and network transfer across nodes
It loads data from S3 to executors
It runs a SQL query across all partitions

questions.question: When should you use a broadcast join in Spark?

options.text: When both tables are very large
When one table is small enough to be sent to every executor, eliminating the shuffle
When the join produces a very wide result
